p.em: TDD Module M4-07: Lock-Free Memory Reclamation

div.p: Implementation Requirement: The local HP cache must be sorted to enable O(M log N) comparison efficiency against the retired node list.

T1 (Scanner): Checks Worker_A's HP slot. It is NULL. T2 (Worker): Publishes Pointer 0xDEADBEEF to HP slot. T3 (Worker): Accesses memory at 0xDEADBEEF. T4 (Scanner): Finishes scan, assumes 0xDEADBEEF is unreferenced. T5 (Scanner): Calls free(0xDEADBEEF). T6 (Worker): USE-AFTER-FREE CRASH.

By performing a full snapshot of all active Hazard Pointers before filtering the retirement list, we establish a global linearization point. Any Mutator publishing after the snapshot cannot possibly see a node that was retired before the scan started.

g.text: Compare Local Snapshot vs Retire List
Scan Logic: Node_A not in Snapshot
HB Constraint: Store must be > Load
